steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for Girl Scouts members aged 14–17 in 1995. Find the row for the 14–17 age category (Seniors) and read the 1995 column value.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '185': This does not match any Seniors value across the years shown; it likely comes from a different age category altogether. ✗
  • Choice B — '727': This is the Juniors count in 1995, not the Seniors count. Wrong row. ✗
  • Choice C — '45': This is the Seniors count in 1994, not 1995. Wrong year. ✗
  • Choice D — '52': The Seniors (14–17 years) row in the 1995 column shows 52. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
